steps.title: Create two values of the function
steps.content: Use the given value and the one-step change as a table. Since $g(9)=11$, the first point is $(9,11)$. The statement $g(x+1)-g(x)=2$ means the output increases by $2$ when $x$ increases by $1$, so $g(10)=13$.

steps.title: Run a linear regression
steps.content: Type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=2$ and $b=-7$, so the function is $g(x)=2x-7$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice D matches $g(x)=2x-7$. It also checks directly: $g(9)=2(9)-7=11$, so choice D is correct.
